summary: Fire migrateLegacyAuthJSON eagerly at cli.Execute() start so v0.1 installs are bridged before any subcommand runs. Silent no-op when nothing to migrate, preserves the stderr-quiet contract for --version/--help/agent-context.
reason: Without eager fire, commands that don't load tokens (e.g. `tesla version`) leave the legacy file untouched and a confused user might still try `auth set-token`. Eager migration removes the disconnect window entirely.
validated_outcome: 4 eager-migrate tests pass plus existing 8 storage tests still pass; covers legacy-absent + no-config silent, config-already-has-tokens silent (legacy preserved), legacy-present-empty-config migrates and renames, legacy-unreadable logs and continues.
upstream_issue: Same client.go-style templated drift on root.go Execute() — call sweep candidate for a generator hook later.
